zh.lifeSummary: 當Agnes Keith of Marischal於1503年出生在英國蘇格蘭金加迪爾時，她的父親Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal48歲，母親Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal41歲。她於大約1525年與Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie結婚。他們至少是1個兒子和6個女兒的父母。她去世於1548年在英國蘇格蘭享年45歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Agnes Keith of Marischal于1503年出生在英国苏格兰金加迪爾时，她的父亲Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal48岁，母亲Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal41岁。她于大约1525年与Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie结婚。他们至少是1个儿子和6个女儿的父母。她去世于1548年在英国苏格兰享年45岁。

nameMeanings.name: Keith
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Scottish: habitational name from the lands of Keith in East Lothian. The placename is derived from British Celtic cait- ‘wood’. In the 17th century numerous bearers of this name settled in Ulster.
German: nickname from Middle High German kīt ‘sprout, offspring’.

History: George Keith (c. 1638–1716), born at Peterhead, Aberdeenshire, Scotland, came to NJ in or before 1685. In 1689 he settled in Philadelphia, where he became headmaster of the school now called the William Penn Charter School. He came into sharp collision with the Quaker leaders in PA and formed a separatist party known as the Christian Quakers, popularly known as ‘Keithians’.

variants.name: Kight
meanings: English: perhaps a variant of   Kite  .

variants.name: Keath
meanings: Scottish and English (mainly Cambridgeshire): variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Kite
meanings: English: nickname from Middle English kete, kyte ‘kite’ (the bird of prey), perhaps a nickname for a rapacious person.
English: habitational name from one or more of the minor places with names deriving from Old English cȳte, cyte ‘cottage, hut, shed’, such as Kite Farm in Swalecliffe (Kent).

variants.name: Keeth
meanings: English and Scottish: variant of   Keith  .

variants.name: Keitt
meanings: Possibly an altered form of German   Keith   2.

nameMeanings.name: Agnes
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Latinized version of the Greek name Hagnē, from the feminine form of the adjective hagnos ‘pure, holy’. This was the name of a young Roman virgin martyred in the persecutions instigated by the Roman emperor Diocletian in ad 303 . She became a very popular saint in the Middle Ages. Her name was early associated with Latin agnus ‘lamb’, leading to the consistent dropping of the initial H- and to her representation in art accompanied by a lamb. The colloquial form Annes led to some confusion with Ann(e) in earlier centuries. Frequent in the medieval period, the name was revived in the 19th century, and has been especially popular in Scotland. See also Annis .

en.lifeSummary: When Agnes Keith of Marischal was born in 1503, in Kincardineshire, Scotland, United Kingdom, her father, Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal, was 48 and her mother, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal, was 41. She married Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie about 1525. They were the parents of at least 1 son and 6 daughters. She died in 1548, in Scotland, United Kingdom, at the age of 45.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Agnes Keith of Marischal est née en 1503, à Kincardineshire, Écosse, Royaume-Uni, son père, Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal, avait 41 ans. Elle a épousé Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie environ 1525. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils et 6 filles. Elle est décédée en 1548, à Écosse, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 45 ans.

de.lifeSummary: Als Agnes Keith of Marischal 1503 in Kincardineshire, Schottland, United Kingdom geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal 48 und ihre Mutter Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal 41. Sie hat um 1525 Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 1 Sohn und 6 Töchter. Sie starb 1548 im Alter von 45 Jahren in Schottland, United Kingdom.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Keith of Marischal è nata il nel 1503 nel Kincardineshire, Scozia, Regno Unito, sua padre, Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal, aveva 48 anni e sua madre, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal, aveva 41 anni. Lei sposato Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie circa 1525. Erano genitori di almeno 1 figlio e 6 figlie. Morì nel 1548, nel Scozia, Regno Unito, all'età di 45 anni.

ja.lifeSummary: Agnes Keith of Marischalが1503年にイギリススコットランドキンカーディンエシュアイアで生まれた時，父Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischalは48歳，母Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischalは41歳であった。約1525年にArchibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervieと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも1人の息子と6人の娘の親であった。彼女は1548年にイギリススコットランドで45歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Agnes Keith of Marischal(이)가 1503년 영국 스코틀랜드 킨카딘실르에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal(은)는 41세였다. 그녀는 대략 1525년 Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들과 여섯 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1548년 영국 스코틀랜드에서 45세의 나이로 사망했다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Agnes Keith of Marischal nasceu em 1503, em Kincardineshire, Escócia, United Kingdom, seu pai, Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal, tinha 41 anos. Ela casou-se com Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie aproximadamente 1525. Eles tiveram pelo menos 1 filho e 6 filhas. Ela faleceu em 1548, em Escócia, United Kingdom, com 45 anos.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Agnes Keith of Marischal родилась в 1503 г. в местности кинкардаинешир, Шотландия, Великобритания, её отцу по имени Sir William Keith 2nd Earl Marischal было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Lady Elizabeth Gordon, of Loachinvar Countess of Marischal, 41. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Archibald Douglas 1st of Glenbervie около 1525 г. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын и 6 дочерей. Она умерла в 1548 г. в местности Шотландия, Великобритания в возрасте 45 лет.
